name: Ginger Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped apples, walnuts, grated ginger, honey, celery, orange juice, and raisins.
2. Mix gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves.
5. Garnish with slices of orange and mint leaves before serving.
